untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of futures contract expiration day (calendar-based event) and identification of specific affected instruments (Nifty + 17 individual stocks, excluding CIPLA, HDFC, M&M, ONGC). These require external data sources and pre-filtering logic not available in the indicator-based rule engine. The core volatility expansion can be captured via india_vix, but the expiration day trigger and stock-level filtering must be implemented at the backtest engine level as separate event handlers.
translation_notes: Used india_vix as proxy for volatility expansion expected on expiration day (HIGH_VOL regime). Entry triggered on elevated volatility. Exit set to close on same trading day or next day with minimal reversal threshold (±2% returns). Direction set to BOTH since signal applies to both long and short volatility positioning. This is a PARTIAL translation — the calendar event and stock filtering logic must be implemented separately in the backtest engine as a pre-filter on entry conditions.
